## Meeting Purpose

[Walkthrough of Siit's CMS (Webflow) and content planning process with GrowthX team.](https://fathom.video/share/ViKTEZFtWrPwsdxgqcNR3a-cyW7C9Me3?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Siit hasn't uploaded blog content yet; team will collaborate on first posts](https://fathom.video/share/ViKTEZFtWrPwsdxgqcNR3a-cyW7C9Me3?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [GrowthX to create AI-generated vector images for blog posts, avoiding stock photos](https://fathom.video/share/ViKTEZFtWrPwsdxgqcNR3a-cyW7C9Me3?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Content authorship strategy: use "Siit team" or specific executives based on topic](https://fathom.video/share/ViKTEZFtWrPwsdxgqcNR3a-cyW7C9Me3?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Airtable used for content planning; Carmel to review and approve/reject topics](https://fathom.video/share/ViKTEZFtWrPwsdxgqcNR3a-cyW7C9Me3?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)

## Topics

### Blog Post Creation Process

  - [New blog articles created via Webflow CMS](https://fathom.video/share/ViKTEZFtWrPwsdxgqcNR3a-cyW7C9Me3?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [GrowthX to generate AI vector images for posts (no real people)](https://fathom.video/share/ViKTEZFtWrPwsdxgqcNR3a-cyW7C9Me3?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Carmel to preview first image before approving style](https://fathom.video/share/ViKTEZFtWrPwsdxgqcNR3a-cyW7C9Me3?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Categories need updating; "ITSM" category added](https://fathom.video/share/ViKTEZFtWrPwsdxgqcNR3a-cyW7C9Me3?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)

### Content Authorship Strategy

  - [General posts: "Siit team" as author](https://fathom.video/share/ViKTEZFtWrPwsdxgqcNR3a-cyW7C9Me3?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Technical posts: Anthony (CPO) as author](https://fathom.video/share/ViKTEZFtWrPwsdxgqcNR3a-cyW7C9Me3?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Broad/overarching topics: Carmel as author](https://fathom.video/share/ViKTEZFtWrPwsdxgqcNR3a-cyW7C9Me3?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [GrowthX to send draft articles for Carmel's approval before posting](https://fathom.video/share/ViKTEZFtWrPwsdxgqcNR3a-cyW7C9Me3?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)

### Content Planning in Airtable

  - [Airtable used for topic clustering and assignment tracking](https://fathom.video/share/ViKTEZFtWrPwsdxgqcNR3a-cyW7C9Me3?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Carmel to review topics: approve, reject, or provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/ViKTEZFtWrPwsdxgqcNR3a-cyW7C9Me3?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [Process for adding new ideas: use '+' sign to add new rows](https://fathom.video/share/ViKTEZFtWrPwsdxgqcNR3a-cyW7C9Me3?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Feedback can be added as comments on individual assignments](https://fathom.video/share/ViKTEZFtWrPwsdxgqcNR3a-cyW7C9Me3?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)

### CMS Access and Support

  - [GrowthX team has access to Webflow via team@\[alias\] email](https://fathom.video/share/ViKTEZFtWrPwsdxgqcNR3a-cyW7C9Me3?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Carmel to provide CPO's name for author attribution](https://fathom.video/share/ViKTEZFtWrPwsdxgqcNR3a-cyW7C9Me3?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [Jess available for Webflow troubleshooting if needed](https://fathom.video/share/ViKTEZFtWrPwsdxgqcNR3a-cyW7C9Me3?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Carmel to review and approve/reject content topics in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/ViKTEZFtWrPwsdxgqcNR3a-cyW7C9Me3?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [GrowthX to deliver two draft articles and tone variations tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/ViKTEZFtWrPwsdxgqcNR3a-cyW7C9Me3?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [GrowthX to create and share first AI-generated blog image for approval](https://fathom.video/share/ViKTEZFtWrPwsdxgqcNR3a-cyW7C9Me3?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Carmel to send CPO's name to Jess for author attribution](https://fathom.video/share/ViKTEZFtWrPwsdxgqcNR3a-cyW7C9Me3?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [Team to begin populating blog with approved content](https://fathom.video/share/ViKTEZFtWrPwsdxgqcNR3a-cyW7C9Me3?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
